title: In production, which file actually gets loaded?
summary: Google for Developers discusses which package file gets loaded in production environments when the same application code uses identical package names but exhibits different behavior after deployment. The video explores package import resolution and module loading in production contexts.
writeup: This Google for Developers video examines which package file actually gets loaded in production when application code references identical package names but behaves differently after deployment. It walks through package import resolution and module loading as they operate in production contexts, including edge deployment. The takeaway is that matching package names do not guarantee matching resolved files, and the loading path can diverge once code is deployed.
